title: Trainings
text:
I am an RStudio certified tidyverse instructor. I enjoy teaching data analysis skills using R. Here are some selected trainings, workshops, and courses I have taught.


2026


Elements of Machine Learning


Azim Premji University, Bhopal


An introductory course for undergraduate students covering parametric and non-parametric machine learning methods.




2025


Web Scraping with R


Azim Premji University, Bengaluru


An applied workshop for postgraduate students on extracting data from static and dynamic websites.




2025


Designing and Programming Survey Forms


Azim Premji University, Bengaluru


Applied training for undergraduate students to use SurveyCTO to design and program survey forms.




2024


Data Visualization — A tour of favourite hits


Artha Global


A talk on good practices, taste, and common mistakes in data visualization.




2023


Business Analytics


Gokhale Institute of Politics and Economics


A course for postgraduate students covering intro to programming, literate programming, data visualization, regression, and classification methods.




2023


Advanced Analytics with R


Gokhale Institute of Politics and Economics


A course for undergraduate students covering regression, classification, resampling methods, regularization, and multiple testing.




2022


R for Data Analysis


Juspay


A course for employees ranging from engineers to product managers, covering R fundamentals, functional programming, literate programming, and RShiny.




2022


Data Visualization


International Indian Statistical Association Conference, IISc Bengaluru


A workshop on data visualization using the grammar of graphics via {ggplot2}.




2022


Parameterized Reporting with R


RLadies Bengaluru


A talk on using Quarto or R Markdown with {purrr} to generate parameterized reports.

title: Ayush Patel
text:
Independent researcher working at the intersection of data, political economy, and development. My work spans experimental and non-experimental methods, data analytics, and teaching.
I am affiliated with the Oxford Poverty and Human Development Initiative (OPHI) as a Researcher, where I built and maintain the Global Multidimensional Poverty Index databank.
If you share similar interests and want to collaborate, feel free to reach out. I am also available for training or consultancy in data analysis, policy, and development.

R / tidyverse RStudio certified Causal inference Data visualisation Open to collaborations
